name: Creating a subject adds it to the subjects list
description: In Settings, the user adds a new subject with a specific name and that exact subject then appears in the subjects list, confirming the create action persisted.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Settings link in the sidebar
Open the Subjects tab in settings
Activate the control to add a new subject
Type the subject name 'Organic Chemistry' into the subject name field
Verify a subject labeled exactly 'Organic Chemistry' now appears as an item in the subjects list, confirming the round-trip from creation to display
